results.rendered_html: durjīva (2. duṣ = jīva) adj. n. schwer zu leben oder subst. n. ein schweres Leben: yathā ca manye durjīvamevaṃ na sukaraṃ dhruvam  R. 2,57,20  (tathā na sumaram  GORR. ). sujīvaṃ nityaśastasya yaḥ parairupajīvyate . rāma tasya tu durjīvaṃ yaḥ parānupajīvati .. 105,5 .  R. GORR. 2,117,12  an beiden Stellen tena st. tasya.
